name: business-strategy
description: Practical business decisions grounded in real operating constraints and measurable outcomes.

scenarios.name: Free Shipping or Percentage Discount
scenarios.description: Recommend a margin-aware promotion strategy with a concrete test plan.
scenarios.prompt: I run an online home-goods store with a $72 average order value, a 42% gross margin, and $9 average shipping cost. About 38% of carts are abandoned after shoppers see shipping. I can either offer free shipping above a threshold or run a 15% sitewide discount, but I cannot afford both. Which should I test first, what exact threshold or offer would you use, and how would you measure whether it improved profit rather than just revenue over the next 30 days?

criteria.name: practicality
criteria.description: The recommendation is feasible for a small operator and includes a usable 30-day test plan.

criteria.name: specificity
criteria.description: The answer uses the supplied economics to propose an exact offer, threshold, metrics, and decision rule.

criteria.name: risk_awareness
criteria.description: The answer identifies margin, customer behavior, and experiment-design risks and explains how to control them.
